codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers VAL-ORCH-004 requirements. The feature adds: (1) rationale field to FollowUpProposal struct, (2) detect_public_api_changes() to inspect plan's affected files for public API changes, (3) is_public_api_file() to identify lib.rs, main.rs, api/, public/, interface/, trait/ paths, (4) generate_rationale() for all FollowUpOpportunityType variants, (5) two tests verifying VAL-ORCH-004 compliance.

issues.description: The `break` statement in `detect_public_api_changes` only exits the inner `for file` loop, not the outer `for step` loop. This means if multiple plan steps have public API files, multiple DocumentationGap opportunities will be pushed despite the comment '// Only one documentation opportunity per task'. This doesn't break tests but could produce noisy duplicate proposals in edge cases.

summary: VAL-ORCH-004 feature implementation passes scrutiny. The followup_generator properly inspects accepted task changes via plan analysis, identifies public API modifications (lib.rs, main.rs, api/, public/, interface/, trait/ paths), and generates structured FollowUpProposal with description, rationale, and affected_items (estimated_files). Tests verify non-empty fields and doc proposal generation. All 13 followup tests pass. Cargo clippy passes with no new warnings. No MockLlm or test doubles in production paths.
